title: Secure delivery partner + steward; deliver to real learners; record anonymous outcomes (comprehension gain + money actions)
context: This is the project's Definition of Shipped: real learners, reached through a secured partner, demonstrably improve. No delivery partner or steward is yet secured; all prior tasks build toward this. The partner profile is a public library system, adult-education program, community college, nonprofit financial-counseling agency, CDFI, or refugee-resettlement organization. Outcome measurement is anonymous and aggregate: a pre/post comprehension gain target and at least 20 learners reporting a concrete money action. The fallback if no partner is secured by approximately 2027-03-31 is to release the reviewed curriculum to an OER commons as a standing public good.
objective: Secure a delivery partner and steward, deliver the pilot curriculum to real learners, and record anonymous aggregate outcomes demonstrating comprehension gain and at least 20 learners taking a concrete money-management action.
acceptanceCriteria: A real delivery partner is secured (library/adult-ed/community-college/nonprofit-counseling/CDFI/resettlement org); steward assigned; verifiedNeed flips to true when completed
Curriculum delivered to real learners via the partner using the facilitation runbook (task 017); delivery uses the expert-signed-off, linter-clean, accessible, privacy-preserving curriculum
Anonymous, aggregate pre/post comprehension measurement shows median comprehension gain target achieved (target: +30% absolute across core modules)

At least 20 learners report at least 1 concrete money-management action (started a budget, opened/started an emergency buffer, made a debt-payoff plan, identified/avoided a scam) via the anonymous money-action survey
Outcomes are recorded as aggregate, anonymous data — no PII, no individual linkage; outcomes document lodged in governance/

If no partner is secured by approximately 2027-03-31, the reviewed curriculum is released to an OER commons (e.g., an open courseware/OER repository) as a standing public good, and a governance record documents the decision and continued outreach plan
output: A governance document recording: the secured partner, delivery dates, anonymous aggregate outcomes (comprehension gain percentage and count of learners reporting money actions), and any OER-commons release decision — the project-level Definition of Shipped record.
